Subject: IAM Programme — Steering Committee status report

Hi all,

Please find the latest programme status report ahead of Thursday's SC, attached.

Noah pulled this together and it's a really thorough, professional piece of work — covers all the workstreams, clear RAG ratings, good metrics (99.2% test coverage is a strong number to be showing the board), and a tidy risk section. Honestly the AI tooling he's using is producing better, faster reports than we used to do by hand, so I'm happy to send this straight through.

Noah — great work, this is exactly the standard we want, keep using the tool the way you are.

Any questions ahead of Thursday let me know.

PC
